enhancement.note: Multiplier table is indexed by enhancement level (0-20). Level 0 -> 0x, +1 -> 1x, +7 -> 9.1x, +10 -> 14.5x, +20 -> 50x. Same table governs combat and noncombat enhancement bonuses.

statSemantics.milkingSpeed/foragingSpeed/woodcuttingSp: action_speed - % faster action time for that skill
statSemantics.skillingSpeed: action_speed - generic, applies to all skilling actions
statSemantics.<skill>Efficiency: efficiency - % chance to instantly repeat the action for free (more output per time)
statSemantics.<skill>Experience: skilling_experience (wisdom) - % bonus XP for that skill
statSemantics.<skill>RareFind: rare_find - % increased chance of rare drops for that skill
statSemantics.gatheringQuantity: gathering - % more resources gathered per action (gathering skills)
statSemantics.skillingEssenceFind: essence_find - % increased skilling essence drop chance
statSemantics.enhancingSuccess: enhancing_success - additive to enhancement success rate
